titleStmt.title: SII 26.666: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 666. (A.R. No. 624 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Rājarāja-Rājakēsarivarman: Year [.] 6, [Āḍi] 14 (?), Wednesday, Puṉarpūsam = 1000 A.D., July 3. The regnal year should be 16 and the

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places and hence certain particulars like the date are not available in full. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumagaḷpōla, etc.,

It records that the sabhai (assembly) of Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu assembled as Peruṁguṟi in the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiyār, and received the order of Uḍaiyapirāṭṭiyār directing that the land meant for those who recited the holy hymns in the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiyār should be given as kāṇi to a certain Kūttaṉ Tirunāvukkariyaṉ. Accordingly a land 18-1/8 mā in extent in Pūṅguḍi, a dēvadāna of the god, was set apart for a couple of people who recited the holy hymns (Tiruppadiyam). It is stated that besides the land, a house-site was also given in this connection.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilaccelviyun taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai maṉa
kkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyuṅ taṭikaipāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyu kuṭamalaināṭuṅ
kāllamuṅ kaliṅkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḻiyuḷellā yāṇṭun toḻu
takai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ kovirājarājarāja- kesaripanmaṟki yāṇṭu 6 Āvatu ve
ṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunallattu sabhaiyom Ivvāṭṭai kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu patiṉā m putaṉkiḻamai
peṟṟa puṉarpūcattu nāḷ tirunallamuṭaiyār śrīkoyilile peruṅkuṟi kūṭi Irukka Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiyār tirunallamuṭaiyārkku
tirupatiyam pāṭuvārkku vaiytta nila nivantam nantevar ṅppāṭuṅ kūttaṉ tirunāvukkaraiyaṉukku kāṇiyākak ka(lve)
lveṭṭik kuṭukkaveṉṟu Aruḷic ceyya sabhaiyomukkut tirumukam varak kā ruḷa tirumukappaṭiye kallil veṭṭik kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ittevar tevatāṉam
pūṅkuṭiyil tiruppatiyam pāṭuvār Iruvarkku vaitta nilam mukkāle muṉṟaraikkāṇiyum Innila maṉaiyum Ūril Irukku maṉaiyum brahma- ṉāyakañ maṉaikku meṟkum te
ruvukku vaṭakkum kucamaṉaikkuk kiḻakkum Uvaccar maṉaikku teṟkum ṉaiyum nāttu kiṇāṟṟiṉ mel pālum
Digital edition of SII 26.666 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
